chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 626 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 01-09-2022 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks releasing of monthly salary from the date of his appointment till date on the ground that he was appointed as Chowkidar in SIDA vide order dated 01-11-2011 on contract basis; however, the official respondents, in their comments, have categorically contended that the alleged appointment order is fake and bogus. Since the petition contains disputed facts, resolution thereof requires recording of pro and contra evidence of the parties, which does not come within the ambit of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. The petition, being not maintainable in law, is dismissed accordingly, leaving the petitioner to approach the relevant forum for redressal of his grievances under usual modes of proceedings, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
